package.name: nav2_prm_planner
package.description: Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM) global planner for Nav2 (nav2_core::GlobalPlanner). Upstream Nav2 ships only search-based global planners (NavFn, Smac, Theta*); this adds a classical sampling-based roadmap planner that samples collision-free milestones, connects nearby ones into a graph, and runs a shortest-path search over it. Part of nav2_experimental_planner: planners not in upstream Nav2.
